title: Alberta looking at legislation to rein in the harmful side of artificial intelligence, Smith says
summary: “I use ChatGPT very frequently when I'm trying to understand a particular issue. It's really very helpful for me to understand what's going on in the world and to see if there are policies that are taking place elsewhere that we should be adopting here."
author: Jackie Carmichael

title: A Visual Guide to Attention Variants in Modern LLMs
summary: From MHA and GQA to MLA, sparse attention, and hybrid architectures
author: Sebastian Raschka, PhD

title: SQL, Typescript, and Agents
summary: How SQL’s Typescript moment will help agents just as much as it’ll help humans.
author: Tristan Handy
